_comment: Ported from V1 backup api-format workflow. Per-branch positive encoders use `from: main_prompt` + `prefix:` to bake the angle keyword in front of the user's subject description. The shared UNet/CLIP/VAE/LoRAs are pinned with literal: bindings to the V1-era filenames; edit via the sidebar if you have different versions installed.
label: Character 3-View
description: Qwen-Image-Edit 2511 + Multiple-Angles LoRA. Front / side / back full-body character turnaround in one workflow run — for character design / animation / game reference sheets. Wide-shot framing keeps the whole figure in view.

prompt.prefix: <sks> front view eye-level shot wide shot, full body, character reference sheet,
<sks> right side view eye-level shot wide shot, full body, character reference sheet,
<sks> back view eye-level shot wide shot, full body, character reference sheet,
